stories.title: RBC Heritage Round 2 — Fitzpatrick Leads at -14
stories.angle: Matt Fitzpatrick shot a second-round 63 to grab a one-shot lead at the RBC Heritage. Akshay Bhatia matched the 63 with 11 birdies, tying the tournament's single-round record. Viktor Hovland sits second at -13.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Matt Fitzpatrick fired a second-round 63 to grab a one-shot lead at the RBC Heritage.

Fitzpatrick leads at -14. Viktor Hovland is T2 at -13. Akshay Bhatia also shot 63 — 11 birdies, tying the tournament's single-round record.

#RBCHeritage #PGATour

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Fitzpatrick's Round 2 63 included a lucky break at the par-3 14th — his tee shot narrowly avoided the water. He birdied from 30 feet.

He leads the RBC Heritage at -14 heading into Saturday.

#RBCHeritage #PGATour

article.headline: RBC Heritage Round 2: Fitzpatrick's 63 Grabs the Lead at -14, Bhatia's 11-Birdie Record Lights Up Harbour Town

stories.title: McIlroy's Place in Golf History — Six Majors, What Comes Next
stories.angle: One week removed from his back-to-back Masters victory, Rory McIlroy now sits at six career major titles — tying Nick Faldo as the European player with the most major wins ever. The question now is how high he can climb among the all-time greats.

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
One week on from Augusta: Rory McIlroy is a back-to-back Masters champion with six career majors — the first to go back-to-back since Tiger Woods in 2001-02.

Six majors ties Nick Faldo as the most by any European player in history.

#Golf #McIlroy

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
McIlroy's six majors tie him with Lee Trevino, Nick Faldo, and Phil Mickelson.

Seven would tie Arnold Palmer, Sam Snead, Gene Sarazen, and Bobby Jones.

The Open at St Andrews and the Ryder Cup in Ireland are still ahead. 🏆

#Golf #Rory

article.headline: Rory McIlroy's Six Majors and the Question That Now Defines His Legacy

stories.title: LIV Golf Mexico City Round 2 — Rahm Leads at -10
stories.angle: Jon Rahm rallied from a rocky start to take a one-shot halfway lead at LIV Golf Mexico City. First-round leader Victor Perez crashed with a 73 to fall to T6.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Jon Rahm overcame a rocky front nine to lead LIV Golf Mexico City at the halfway mark.

Rahm leads at -10. Wolff, McKibbin, and Varner III are at -9. First-round leader Victor Perez shot 73 to fall to T6 at -6.

#LIVGolf

article.headline: LIV Golf Mexico City Round 2: Rahm Rallies to Lead at -10 as Perez's 73 Ends His Early Magic

stories.title: LPGA JM Eagle LA Championship R2 — Sei Young Kim Leads at -14
stories.angle: Sei Young Kim shot a second consecutive bogey-free 65 to lead the JM Eagle LA Championship at -14, one ahead of first-round leader Chisato Iwai. The final LPGA event before the Chevron major is at the halfway point.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Sei Young Kim shot a second consecutive 65 — bogey-free — to lead the JM Eagle LA Championship at -14.

Kim leads Chisato Iwai (-13) by one. Insun Yoon is third at -12.

The final LPGA event before the Chevron major is at the halfway point.

#LPGA

article.headline: LPGA JM Eagle LA Championship Round 2: Sei Young Kim's Bogey-Free 65 Puts Her Atop the Leaderboard at -14

stories.title: LIV Golf's Masters Reckoning — One Player in the Top 30
stories.angle: LIV Golf placed just one player under par inside the top 30 at the 2026 Masters — Tyrrell Hatton at T3. Jon Rahm, once one of golf's premier major contenders, finished T-38. With the Saudi PIF reportedly reconsidering its funding, LIV's post-Masters moment calls for scrutiny.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Just one LIV Golf player finished under par at the 2026 Masters — Tyrrell Hatton at T3.

Jon Rahm, once a perennial major contender, finished T-38. The Saudi PIF is reportedly reconsidering its $5B+ investment in LIV.

#LIVGolf #Golf

article.headline: LIV Golf's Masters Reckoning: Ten Players, One Top-30 Finish, and a $5 Billion Question
